intro: Barosma betulina, also known as the round-leaved barosma, is a plant native to South Africa and is often used in traditional medicine. The leaves of the Barosma betulina plant are typically used to make a balm or cream that has been traditionally used to treat various skin conditions, including wounds, acne, and eczema. The balm is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular natural remedy for soothing and protecting the skin.

blend recipe: Barosma betulina balm is a natural remedy often used to soothe and calm irritated skin.
